mapper.update: UPDATE APP_MEMBER SET STATUS = 'BLOCKED',BLOCKED_AT = LOCALTIMESTAMP, UPDATED_AT = LOCALTIMESTAMP WHERE STATUS = 'ACTIVE' AND MEMBER_STATUS = 'ACTIVE' AND ROLE != 'ADMIN' AND TRUNC(NVL(LAST_LOGIN_AT, CREATED_AT)) <= ADD_MONTHS(TRUNC(SYSDATE),-12)

UPDATE APP_MEMBER SET STATUS = 'DELETED', MEMBER_STATUS = 'DELETED', DELETE_REASON = '1년 이상 미로그인 후 차단 상태 30일 경과', DELETE_REQUESTED_AT = LOCALTIMESTAMP, DELETED_AT = LOCALTIMESTAMP, HARD_DELETE_AT = LOCALTIMESTAMP + INTERVAL '3' DAY, UPDATED_AT = LOCALTIMESTAMP WHERE STATUS = 'BLOCKED' AND MEMBER_STATUS = 'ACTIVE' AND ROLE != 'ADMIN' AND BLOCKED_AT IS NOT NULL AND BLOCKED_AT <= LOCALTIMESTAMP - INTERVAL '30' DAY
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM APP_MEMBER WHERE STATUS = 'DELETED' AND MEMBER_STATUS = 'DELETED' AND ROLE != 'ADMIN' AND HARD_DELETE_AT IS NOT NULL AND HARD_DELETE_AT <= LOCALTIMESTAMP AND ( MEMBER_STATUS = 'DELETE_PENDING' OR( STATUS = 'DELETED' AND MEMBER_STATUS = 'DELETED') )
